mapper.select: SELECT d.*, p.name as parent_name FROM department d LEFT JOIN department p ON d.parent_id = p.id ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.id
SELECT d.*, p.name as parent_name FROM department d LEFT JOIN department p ON d.parent_id = p.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (name, code, description, parent_id, sort_order, status, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, description = #{description}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE name = #{name} AND id != #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
